projects.title: Cruise booking engine
projects.summary: Lead developer · direct-to-consumer SPA · 2025 Magellan Award
narrative: The assisted legacy flow couldn't carry unassisted direct-to-consumer sales. Rather than retrofit it, I built a ground-up single-page booking engine, shipping the dynamic form layer as a TypeScript micro-frontend inside the existing Nuxt ecosystem so it could evolve without destabilizing the core.
The result is a fully self-serve cruise booking experience that lifted direct revenue and won the 2025 Magellan Award.

projects.title: Link in Bio platform
projects.summary: Themeable React app, integrated into the corporate CMS
narrative: Barstool needed brands to spin up white-label landing pages without an engineer in the loop every time. I built the Link in Bio platform as a themeable React app wired directly into the corporate CMS, so non-technical teams configure and ship pages themselves.
It runs in production at barstoolsports.com/bios across the brand portfolio.

projects.title: Afterparty Post
projects.summary: Freelance · marketing site for a video post-production studio
narrative: A freelance build for a remote video post-production studio whose client roster includes Google, Intel, and Nike. I designed and shipped the full marketing site end to end — the kind of self-contained engagement where the brief, the build, and the delivery were all mine.
projects.note: Confirm year and stack before publishing.

projects.title: Public-health campaigns
narrative: Three and a half years leading full-stack delivery for federally funded public-health campaigns — FDA, HHS, and state health departments, including This Free Life and Fresh Empire.
Every build shipped under strict Section 508 and WCAG compliance with screen-reader testing as a release gate, across a multi-stack fleet (Nuxt, Next.js, Laravel, WordPress).
